MELItem.Title: Overhead Flight Crew Rest (OFCR) Smoke Detection Systems

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Inoperative smoke detection system is deactivated.

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit OFCR inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative smoke detection system and deactivate the OFCR closed (AMM DDG 26-14-02).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the crew rest smoke detection system.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker SMOKE DETECTOR-OFCR and lock with an INOP tag.
Deactivate the associated crew rest area closed.
Remove all baggage and personal items from the associated crew/attendant rest.

Note.Para: Blankets, pillows and other items normally used in the crew rest may remain.

ListItem.Para: Close the associated crew rest entrance door.

OperationProcedure.Para: The crew rest area is not available for inflight use. Remove personal items and do not enter except for inspections by crew members.
For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Associated bunk is not used and personal items are removed.
A conspicuous barrier strap or rope is placed across the associated bunk with a placard attached stating that the bunk is not to be used.
Remove all personal items from the associated bunk.
Place a barrier strap or rope across the associated bunk.

OperationProcedure.Para: The bunk associated with the inoperative smoke detector is not available for inflight use. Remove personal items from the bunk.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: For entrance area curtain installed, entrance area curtain is secured open or removed.
